title: melissa alpina
intro: Melissa alpina, also known as alpine lemon balm, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the mint family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Melissa alpina include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve sleep quality. Melissa alpina can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies.
